title: Senior Doctor - Alkem Laboratories - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Alkem Laboratories - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Alkem Laboratories has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Bengaluru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Alkem Laboratories:
Alkem Laboratories is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in NABH Standards

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Alkem Laboratories!
